mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pki_app.${tableName} ( cert_serial, issuer_id, subject_id, is_current, not_after, first_activated_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{record.certSerial}, #{record.issuerId}, #{record.subjectId}, #{record.current}, #{record.notAfter}, #{record.firstActivatedAt}, #{record.createdAt}, #{record.updatedAt} ) ON CONFLICT (cert_serial, issuer_id) DO UPDATE SET subject_id = EXCLUDED.subject_id, is_current = EXCLUDED.is_current, not_after = EXCLUDED.not_after, first_activated_at = COALESCE(pki_app.${tableName}.first_activated_at, EXCLUDED.first_activated_at), updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at
